Short CV

Assistant Professor Dr. Hasan ÇİÇEK   was born  in Gerger. He completed  Cumhuriyet Secondary School and Karşıyaka High School in Adana. He won state scholarship for studying abroad  among thousands of students. He went to England in 1978 . . He started with language school and then did his A levels. He completed BSc Honours degree in Textile Engineering and then he did his PhD in

Computer

Simulation Of  Melt Spinning

at Leeds University.

Dr. Çiçek has return to Turkey in 1987. He started in Kordsa ( İzmit )as a Research and Development Engineer. In 1991 he moved  to SASA ( Adana ) and worked as a Management System Manager for setting management systems.

He also worked for Berdan Tekstil as a Quality System Coordinator .

He lectured Part-Time at Çukurova University ( Adana)  in  Industrial Engineering Department. His lectures were about Quality Systems and simulation to the post graduate students. He supervised  students for their MSc thesis.

In 1996 he set his consultancy firm named

Lider Eğitim Danışmanlık. Under this consultancy firm he started to give consultancy to well known companies in Turkey and abroad.

Assistant Prof. Dr. Dr. Hasan ÇİÇEK gave  consultancy to more than 100 firms

ISO 9001, ISO 14001, OHSAS 18001, İSG ve  Human Resources Management Systems.

.

Sabancı Holding),

KİPAŞ Holding

AYKA Grubu

Mogul Tekstil

- G. Antep , Derince Devlet Hastanesi are among those firms that he gave consultancy service.

Dr. Hasan ÇİÇEK knows perfect english and a bit of german language.

Dr. Çiçek has written many essays in well known national newspapers and magazines especially on management systems and attended many panels as a speaker.

Areas of expertize :  Company organization, Total Quality, Management Systems, Production Planning,Quality Control, Stratejik Planning, Communication, Human Resources Management, Performance evaluatio and  Effective team work
